title: stelis cooperi
intro: Stelis cooperi, also known as the "Honey Orchid," is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. As an herb, Stelis cooperi is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Stelis cooperi is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
